options.name: -id
options.description: Specify the window ID of the CTD window which need to zoom.

options.name: -selected
options.description: Zoom to enclose all selected objects.

options.name: -vertical_range
options.description: Zoom to a specific vertical range. If CTD is in timing-based mode, the window will zoom to the clock tree parts where latency is between ymin and ymax, the unit is the same as global timing unit; if CTD is in unit delay mode, the window will zoom to the clock tree parts where stage depth is between ymin and ymax. The window only zooms in vertical.
